_meta.purpose: Authoritative list of MangaDex scanlation_group UUIDs that represent official publishers (licensed publishing platforms, not fan scanlation groups). Used by sites/_publishers.py to annotate chapter dicts with is_official=True + publisher=name. The chapter_merger then prefers these sources when building the per-chapter rank within multi-source.
_meta.review_notes: Corporate events shift this list — INKR shut down 2024, MangaPlus Creators launched 2024, etc. Re-verify UUIDs every 90 days via: GET https://api.mangadex.org/group?name=<publisher> and check attributes.official=true. Add new entries with `added` date and existing entries with `removed` + `status=defunct` rather than deleting.

schema.name: Display name shown to users (matches MangaDex's group attributes.name)
schema.mangadex_group_id: UUID — primary match key. Prefer this over name match because group names can drift across rebrands.
schema.name_aliases: Optional list of alternate strings to also match the chapter's group_name against (case-insensitive). Useful when other sites' handlers populate group_name with a slightly different spelling.
schema.added: ISO date when added to this catalog
schema.status: active | defunct (kept for historical bookmarks but won't gain new chapters)

publishers.name: INKR Comics
publishers.defunct_note: INKR Comics shut down operations in 2024. UUID retained for historical chapters that may still be hosted on MangaDex.
